decisionSummary.purpose: Move a release decision through gates, rollback, receipt, and follow-up.
decisionSummary.scenario: A team wants to ship before rollback and receipts are ready.
decisionSummary.closeoutSummary: Ship is paused until rollback and receipt capture are visible.
decisionSummary.parkingLot: Support-load estimate and customer notice wording.

claimBoundary: This is a philosophy and systems-design model, not a claim that physical laws literally want, think, or feel.
